// Function to get the base path function getBasePath() { // If we're on GitHub Pages, use the repository name as base path if (window.location.hostname.includes('github.io')) { const pathParts = window.location.pathname.split('/'); // The first part is empty, second part is the username, third is the repo name if (pathParts.length > 2) { return `/${pathParts[1]}/${pathParts[2]}/`; } return '/'; } return '/'; } // Handle client-side routing with dynamic base path document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => { try { const redirect = sessionStorage.getItem('redirect'); if (redirect) { const { path, search, hash } = JSON.parse(redirect); sessionStorage.removeItem('redirect'); // Get the current base path const fullPath = window.location.pathname; const pathParts = fullPath.split('/').filter(Boolean); const isGitHubPages = window.location.hostname.includes('github.io'); const basePath = isGitHubPages ? `/${pathParts[0] || ''}` : ''; // Construct the target URL with the correct base path const targetPath = `${basePath}${path || '/'}${search || ''}${hash || ''}`; const currentPath = window.location.pathname + window.location.search + window.location.hash; // Only navigate if we're not already at the correct path if (currentPath !== targetPath) { window.history.replaceState({}, '', targetPath); } } } catch (e) { console.warn('Error handling redirect:', e); } }); // Polyfill Promise if needed if (!window.Promise) { const script = document.createElement('script'); script.src = 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/promise-polyfill@8.3.0/dist/polyfill.min.js'; script.crossOrigin = 'anonymous'; script.integrity = 'sha384-1q8mTJOASx8j1Au+a5WDVnPi2lkFfwwEAa8hDDdjZlpLegxhjVME1fgjWPGmkzs7'; script.onload = () => console.log('Promise polyfill loaded'); script.onerror = () => console.error('Failed to load Promise polyfill'); document.head.appendChild(script); } // Polyfill fetch if needed if (!window.fetch) { const script = document.createElement('script'); script.src = 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/whatwg-fetch@3.6.2/dist/fetch.umd.min.js'; script.crossOrigin = 'anonymous'; script.integrity = 'sha384-+pnlVXm9dM6eMtJsLjo4CWkCOSJXmIW72qVqfWxoIWvLGs2OS8JdM7KNifeD7Q7gY'; script.onload = () => console.log('Fetch polyfill loaded'); script.onerror = () => console.error('Failed to load Fetch polyfill'); document.head.appendChild(script); }
